78],[343,615,1776529860591],[340,599,1776529860603],[337,584,1776529860615],[335,572,1776529860628],[333,563,1776529860639],[332,558,1776529860657],[331,555,1776529860671],[331,556,1776529860679],[332,556,1776529860696],[333,556,1776529860716],[333,557,1776529860728],[334,557,1776529860740],[335,558,1776529860755],[335,559,1776529860783],[336,559,1776529860796],[337,559,1776529860810],[339,558,1776529860822],[340,558,1776529860831],[341,557,1776529860840],[342,557,1776529860851],[343,557,1776529860881],[344,556,1776529860890],[345,556,1776529860906],[346,556,1776529860914],[348,555,1776529860921],[349,555,1776529860928],[350,555,1776529860935],[351,554,1776529860948],[351,554,1776529860965],[350,554,1776529860976],[349,554,1776529860988],[348,554,1776529861023],[347,553,1776529861047],[346,552,1776529861057],[345,552,1776529861076]],"mm-mp":18.07683615819209,"md":[[335,559,1776529860800]],"md-mp":3504.0,"mu":[[379,496,1776529853702],[335,559,1776529860949]],"mu-mp":3523.0},"v":1,"tc":{}}
